crime.value: Murder of Hailey by Emily (Garry's girlfriend)
crime.quote: she got killed by Garrys real girlfriend because Garry was also drunk the day they met each other

victim.value: Hailey, 20-year-old with drinking problem who unknowingly interfered with Emily's relationship
victim.quote: There once was this girl named Hailey she was 20 years old.She was always drunk driving

culprit_and_motive.value: Emily killed Hailey out of jealousy over Garry
culprit_and_motive.quote: she got killed by Garrys real girlfriend because Garry was also drunk

resolution.value: Emily was sent to jail for life
resolution.quote: emily was sent t jail for life

suspect_architecture.value: Three suspects with limited differentiation: Garry (met victim while drunk), Emily (jealous girlfriend with clear motive and means), and indirectly Hailey herself (self-destructive behavior)
suspect_architecture.quote: Hailey got killed by Garrys real girlfriend because Garry was also drunk the day they met each other

red_herring.value: Emily's imprisonment for murder serves as misdirection from the actual cause of death - wolf attack in woods
red_herring.quote: emily was sent t jail for life...Hailey got attacked by a wolf and she died but no one knew she died this way

social_world.value: Simple social dynamics: romantic triangles, family obligations, institutional authority (police, hospital, workplace)
social_world.quote: Haileys mom called the police and they arrived at her house

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical discovery of body reveals true cause of death - wolf attack rather than Emily's presumed murder
reveal_mechanic.quote: They looked in the woods and found her body and there she laid covered in blood

investigator_wound.value: Mother's desperate search and institutional failure - hospital loses patient, police provide incomplete information
investigator_wound.quote: she started screaming like mad and the the nurses came in and found the window opened
